# Confirm built (cidr list matching)

**Dataset**: `gx_10_conn` (synthetic scenario lab dataset — the technique transfers to your real datasets)

IP / CIDR matching with incidr and the is_* address helpers. Confirm built.

```sql
dataset = gx_10_conn | fields ts, src_ip, dst_ip | sort asc ts | limit 100
```

_Live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (returned 18). From the 20-scenario XQL coverage program; technique is dataset-portable._
